recommendations.title: A New Leaf
recommendations.overview: After running out of funds, Henry Graham, a carefree playboy, plots to marry and murder wealthy botanist Henrietta Lowell.

recommendations.title: Mikey and Nicky
recommendations.overview: Nick is desperate, holed up in a cheap hotel, suffering from an ulcer and convinced that a local mob boss wants him killed. Terrified, he calls Mikey, his friend since childhood and a fellow gangster. So begins a long night…

recommendations.title: The Heartbreak Kid
recommendations.overview: Three days into his Miami honeymoon with needy and unsophisticated Lila, Lenny meets tall, blonde Kelly. This confirms his fear that he has made a serious mistake and he decides he wants to be with Kelly instead.

recommendations.title: Equilibrium
recommendations.overview: In a dystopian future, a totalitarian regime maintains peace by subduing the populace with a drug, and displays of emotion are punishable by death. A man in charge of enforcing the law rises to overthrow the system.

recommendations.title: Sleeper
recommendations.overview: Miles Monroe, a clarinet-playing health food store proprietor, is revived out of cryostasis 200 years into a future world in order to help rebels fight an oppressive government regime.

recommendations.title: Resort to Love
recommendations.overview: Aspiring pop star Erica ends up as the entertainment at her ex-fiancé’s wedding after reluctantly taking a gig at a luxurious island resort while in the wake of a music career meltdown.

recommendations.title: Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt: Kimmy vs. the Reverend
recommendations.overview: It's an interactive Kimmy special! Kimmy's getting married, but first she has to foil the Reverend's evil plot. It's your move: What should she do next?

recommendations.title: Cardcaptor Sakura: The Sealed Card
recommendations.overview: All of the Clow Cards have been captured, and Sakura Kinomoto, the new Master of the Cards, is preparing to play the lead in the play for the town festival. However, a new evil force is causing mysterious events all over Tomoeda, including the disapp

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: MR-9: Do or Die
recommendations.overview: Elite Bangladeshi CIA agent Masud Rana – codename MR-9 – teams up with an American CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.
